name: NO RELOADING: Survival Trials
short_description: NO RELOADING is a stunt-driven action game where your tractor beam powers let you weaponize everything, including yourself. Master bullet-time acrobatics, chain deadly combos, and invent synergistic upgrades. You'll need every stylish trick to rescue your best doggo from sinister goblins.
detailed_description:
NO RELOADING is a stunt-driven action game where skill, style, and creative combat combine in your mission to rescue your best friend.

As Roger the robot, wield powerful tractor beam technology to turn both yourself and the environment into deadly weapons against the evolving goblin menace who has kidnapped your best doggo, Duke.

Master Your Tractor Beam Powers

Your tractor beam limbs aren't just weapons... they're tools for unlimited creativity. Grab enemies' guns, throw explosive barrels, capture bullets mid-air, or launch yourself into acrobatic maneuvers. Every object in the environment is a potential weapon, and every movement can chain into devastating combinations.

Style Equals Survival

The more stylish your combat, the longer you survive. Chain a wall-run into a cartwheel into a slide, perform bullet-time somersaults while dual-wielding miniguns, and execute perfectly timed throws to maintain your style meter. This isn't just for show... your very survival depends on staying awesome!

Two Distinct Challenges

Perfect your moves in Survival Trials, a homebrewed video game turned training ground where Duke once served as your virtual dungeon master. Invent new abilities, synergize with augments, then put them to the test in an escalating war against increasingly sophisticated goblin hordes. Each victory brings you closer to rescuing your best doggo!

NO RELOADING

Forget that reload button! Your tractor beam powers let you instantly grab fresh weapons from enemies or turn anything into a projectile. Master the art of weapon-switching mid-combo to maintain unrelenting pressure on your foes.

Streamer Mode

Transform Survival Trials into an interactive experience where viewers can aid or challenge you. Give your audience the power to provide weapons and upgrades, or let them spawn enemies and create chaos... the choice is theirs!

The goblins took your best friend. Show them why that was their last mistake.
